name: Mean Reversion
description: Reversal model that fades a fresh 2 ATR spike against the 30 over 200 EMA bias when that same spike has not repeated in the last 10 bars.

trigger: Long when the 30 EMA is below the 200 EMA, price prints a fresh upside spike, and there has not been another upside spike in the last 10 bars.
Short when the 30 EMA is above the 200 EMA, price prints a fresh downside spike, and there has not been another downside spike in the last 10 bars.

earlyExit: Long exit when the 30 EMA crosses back above the 200 EMA.
Short exit when the 30 EMA crosses back below the 200 EMA.

checks.label: The 30 EMA is below the 200 EMA
Price just printed a 2 ATR upside spike
No upside spike printed in the last 10 bars
The 30 EMA is above the 200 EMA
Price just printed a 2 ATR downside spike
No downside spike printed in the last 10 bars
The 30 EMA has crossed back above the 200 EMA
The 30 EMA has crossed back below the 200 EMA
